title: Sands of Service
description: The Priest of Chronos requires sacred sand from three blessed sites to craft ceremonial hourglasses. The sand must be collected from Elder Moor's old timekeeping shrine, a windswept hilltop near Thornfield, and the ruins of Willow Dale where time once stood still.

objectives.description: Collect sacred sand from Elder Moor
Collect sacred sand from the hilltop near Thornfield
Collect sacred sand from Willow Dale Ruins
Deliver the three sands to the Priest of Chronos

notes: DESIGN INTENT: Multi-location collection quest that encourages exploration across the allowed zones. Players must visit 3 different areas, introducing them to the geography. Willow Dale is a dungeon, adding mild danger. The ceremonial_hourglass trinket is a keepsake item that can be sold or kept.
